title: Enchanted Menu
description: Adds a menu that simplifies enchanting items in creative mode from level 1-255
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rhBpIqSoMu0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This mod adds a convenient menu to Creative mode, accessible with the keyboard shortcut Ctrl + X, where you can enchant any item to any level from 1 to 255. You can also change the weather or time of day using the buttons in the menu
